ground_truth.title: Consulting - is it worth it?
ground_truth.main_content: Dear fellow monkeys, I am right now doing my Bachelor's in IT, I have so far an internship at an IT implementation consultancy, an internship at a Big4 and I am about to do an internship at another Big4 in IT assurance/compliance. I was just wondering if consulting is really worth it? I mean the hours seem terrible and I'm not sure if I would enjoy it. I have always been more into tech stuff and I am considering doing a Master in Information Systems afterwards. I just wanted to hear your thoughts. Thanks in advance!
